articles.title: Starc cleared to travel to India, hopeful of playing for DC in early May
articles.description: Mitchell Starc has been cleared of shoulder and elbow issues and will travel to India on Friday with hopes of being available to play for Delhi Capitals on May 1

articles.title: All eyes on Dhoni and Rohit as IPL's defining rivalry returns
articles.description: It's CSK vs MI again, but both teams have been far from their best in recent years and find themselves at a crossroads

articles.title: Wolvaardt seals series for SA with blazing hundred
articles.description: The result means South Africa have won all three of their home series this season in preparation for June's T20 World Cup

articles.title: Nawaz under investigation after positive test for recreational drug use
articles.description: ESPNcricinfo has learned the positive result comes from testing during T20 World Cup earlier this year

articles.title: Jude Bellingham buys minority stake in Hundred franchise Birmingham Phoenix
articles.description: Real Madrid star and Birmingham City graduate invests approx £1 million in home city club

articles.title: Wasim Khan to step down as ICC's general manager
articles.description: His impending exit follows the departure of several senior ICC officials over the last two years

articles.title: Shanaka banned from PSL for one year for IPL switch
articles.description: Shanaka opted out of a contract with Lahore Qalandars and later joined IPL team Rajasthan Royals

articles.title: Former Afghanistan quick Shapoor Zadran battles for his life in Delhi hospital
articles.description: Shapoor Zadran is suffering from Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a rare, life-threatening disease, in which the immune system starts failing

articles.title: Five UAE cricketers given citizenship through naturalisation
articles.description: Khuzaima Tanveer, Ajay Kumar, Akshdeep Nath, Harpreet Bhatia and Adeeb Usmani are the players with UAE citizenship

articles.title: Sarfaraz appointed head coach as Pakistan name four newbies for Bangladesh Tests
articles.description: Abdullah Fazal, Amad Butt, Azan Awais, and Ghazi Ghori are the new faces in Pakistan's Test squad; Asad Shafiq (batting coach) and Umar Gul (bowling coach) join the back room

articles.title: Three Pondicherry cricketers suspended for assaulting, attempting to murder team coach
articles.description: The said players are hereby suspended with immediate effect from all cricketing activities conducted under the aegis of CAP.
